summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hotel and Agency registration flows. All backend APIs (13 tests) passed. Frontend multi-step forms work correctly with proper validation, navigation, and user role upgrades.
passed_tests: Backend: Hotel registration API (POST /api/hotels/register) - creates hotel with simple JSON
Backend: Hotel registration with full data including translations and amenities
Backend: Hotel registration upgrades customer to hotel_owner role
Backend: Hotel registration requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Agency registration API (POST /api/agencies) - creates agency
Backend: Agency registration with optional fields (address, website)
Backend: Agency registration upgrades customer to agency_owner role
Backend: Agency registration requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Agency duplicate email rejection (400 error)
Backend: Auth login with valid credentials
Backend: Auth login rejects invalid credentials (401)
Backend: Auth register creates new user
Backend: Auth /me endpoint returns user info
Frontend: Hotel registration Step 1 - Basic Info (name, property type, star rating)
Frontend: Hotel registration Step 2 - Location & Description (city, district, description)
Frontend: Hotel registration Step 3 - Amenities (12 options, min 3 required)
Frontend: Hotel registration Step 4 - Photos and contact info
Frontend: Hotel registration form submission and redirect to extranet
Frontend: Agency registration Step 1 - Company Info (name, tax number, website)
Frontend: Agency registration Step 2 - Contact Info (contact person, email, phone)
Frontend: Agency registration Step 3 - Location with application summary
Frontend: Agency registration form submission and redirect to agency dashboard
Frontend: User role upgrade reflected in dashboard after registration

features: Accepts flat JSON structure matching frontend form
Sets default commission (10%) and markup (5%) rates
Step 1: Hotel name (EN/TR), property type dropdown, star rating
Step 2: City dropdown (20 Turkish cities), district, description (EN/TR)
Step 3: 12 amenity options with icons, check-in/out time selectors
Step 4: Photo upload with drag & drop, contact info
Redirects to extranet dashboard after success
Step 1: Agency name, tax number, website (optional)
Redirects to agency dashboard after success

hotel_registration.layout: Split-screen with left hero pane (dark navy) and right form pane (white)
hotel_registration.left_pane: Turkish heading, metrics (+50% Doluluk Artışı, 100+ Ülke Erişimi, %0 Kayıt Ücreti), step labels
hotel_registration.right_pane: Step indicator, form fields with icons, validation messages
hotel_registration.mobile: Mobile header with logo, progress bar, form content only

agency_registration.layout: Split-screen with left hero pane (dark navy) and right form pane (white)
agency_registration.left_pane: Turkish heading, benefits list, stats (2,500+ Otel & Tesis, 500+ Aktif Acenta, ₺50M+ Aylık İşlem)
agency_registration.right_pane: Step indicator, form fields with icons, application summary on final step

seed_data_creation: Multiple test hotels and agencies created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotel and Agency registration flows are fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/hotels/register and /api/agencies work correctly. Frontend forms at /extranet/register (4 steps) and /agency/register (3 steps) work correctly. User roles are upgraded after registration (customer -> hotel_owner or agency_owner). All Turkish content displays correctly.
